ddls:
CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_code" INTEGER /* Code assigned to the zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the zone */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the zone */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the zone */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the zone */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the zone */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the zone */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the zone information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "scode_bma" INTEGER /* Code assigned to the monitoring station */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone where the station is located */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the monitoring station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "last_calibrated" TEXT /* Date the station was last calibrated */,
  "last_maintained" TEXT /* Date the station was last maintained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monitoring_stations_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor */,
  "sensor_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  "sensor_range" TEXT /* Range of values the sensor can measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor */,
  "last_maintained" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last maintained */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Current battery level of the sensor */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor from which the data was collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the collected data */,
  "time_of_collection" TEXT /* Time of the day when the data was collected */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the collected data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical summary */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of data points */,
  "area" REAL /* Area covered by the data */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the data */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the data */,
  "range" REAL /* Range of the data */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean of the data */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the data */,
  "sum_value" REAL /* Sum of the data values */,
  "median" REAL /* Median of the data */,
  "mode" REAL /* Mode of the data */,
  "variance" REAL /* Variance of the data */,
  "skewness" REAL /* Skewness of the data */,
  "kurtosis" REAL /* Kurtosis of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_statistics_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the data file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the readme file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is the default role for new users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry in the report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the data included in the report */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection */,
  "flag_type" TEXT /* Type of flag */,
  "flag_date" TEXT /* Date the flag was raised */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  "flag_status" TEXT /* Status of the flag */,
  "is_urgent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the flag is urgent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_flags_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_collections ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
